source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A condenser brings 1 kg/s water flow at 10 kPa quality 95% to saturated liquid at 10kPa. The cooling is done by lake water at 20\circ\text{C} that returns to the lake at 30\circ\text{C}. For an insulated condenser, find the flow rate of cooling water.
